title: millettia irvinei
intro: Millettia irvinei, also known as the Ironplow tree, is a species of flowering plant in the legume family. It is traditionally used in medicine in various parts of the world due to its medicinal properties, which include analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic activities. The health benefits of Millettia irvinei include pain relief, wound healing, and the reduction of fever and inflammation. Herbal preparations of this plant are often made by infusing its roots or leaves in hot water, which can be used to treat various ailments.
